description_long: This house features a modern, geometric design with multiple stacked rectangular volumes and flat roofs, some of which are covered with green vegetation. The exterior is finished in a muted pinkish-beige color, complemented by white railings that enclose several rooftop terraces and balconies. Large, open platforms and walkways connect the different levels, providing ample outdoor space and visual interest. The structure includes several entry points, with visible doors and steps leading to various levels, and is punctuated by minimalistic windows. The building is elevated in some sections, creating shaded areas beneath the upper floors. Human figures placed around the house help convey its scale and accessibility.
description: A modern, multi-level house with flat green roofs, pinkish-beige exterior, white railings, and spacious terraces connected by open walkways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, multiple terraces with white railings, and green rooftop areas.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the staggered levels, rooftop gardens, and interconnected platforms.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a large, uninterrupted wall, a single green roof, and minimal visible entry points.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the expansive terrace, white railings, and the vertical stacking of building volumes.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with steps, flush door, and no porch or decorative overhangs
